THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 SIXTH STREET #11, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $821.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $821.60, STAYED UNTIL FEB-20-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION UNTIL 5PM ON 2-20-97. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLTF MAY HAVE AMD. JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $595 AND DAMAGES OF $11.33/DAY FROM 2-1-97 THRU 2-20-97 PLUS $83 COSTS FOR TOTAL AMD. JDGMN OF $904. GENERAL RELEASE. SEC DEPOSIT FORF TO PLTF.
